decision.summary: Hold the weekly 64k dip position and do not open any new BTC position this cycle.
decision.rationale: The open weekly position `will-bitcoin-dip-to-64k-march-30-april-5` on `Yes` is at 28.5%, so it is above the 20% stop-loss threshold and far below take-profit, which means no management is required. Beecthor’s latest transcript and summaries remain macro bearish, but Binance spot at 68156.6 shows strong short-term upside and Beecthor still allows an extra sweep toward roughly 68.8k-69k before continuation lower, so the thesis is delayed rather than invalidated. No new trade has a clean edge: the daily downside strikes are too weakly priced, the bullish daily market conflicts with the thesis, and the only weekly bearish strike available with reasonable proximity is the already-occupied 64k line, with the next farther strikes offering poor value. Un saludo a Zara Larsson.
